activities.title: Morning Walk/Jog at Freedom Park
activities.description: Start your day with a refreshing walk or jog through Freedom Park, often called Charlotte's 'Central Park'. Enjoy expansive green spaces, well-maintained trails, and a scenic lake. It's also a popular dog-friendly spot.

activities.title: Explore Art at McColl Center
activities.description: Immerse yourself in contemporary art at the McColl Center for Art + Innovation. This dynamic space in Uptown Charlotte is always free to enter and showcases art being actively created by resident artists, offering a unique cultural experience.
activities.location: McColl Center for Art + Innovation, Uptown

activities.title: Discover the Free Little Art Gallery
activities.description: Experience Charlotte's unique Free Little Art Gallery at StudioWorks. Take a piece of art, leave a piece, or both! It's an accessible and unexpected art encounter where everyone and all art is welcome, fostering community creativity.

activities.title: Networking Night at Alchemy CLT
activities.description: Join a casual, come-as-you-are evening of great conversations at Alchemy CoWorking. This unstructured networking event is perfect for meeting new people and expanding your professional and social circles in a relaxed setting.

activities.title: Ballantyne Evening Hike/Ruck
activities.description: Join the Charlotte Piedmont Hiking Club for a moderate 5-mile evening hike or ruck in Ballantyne. This is a great opportunity to get some exercise, enjoy the outdoors, and meet fellow adventurers in a social group setting.

activities.title: Comedy Open Mic at Starlight on 22nd
activities.description: Enjoy a free comedy open mic night at Starlight on 22nd, a known queer-friendly spot in Charlotte. Discover local comedic talent and enjoy a lively, welcoming atmosphere perfect for a fun evening out.

activities.title: Pub Trivia at Petty Thieves Brewing Co.
activities.description: Test your knowledge and enjoy a fun, free pub trivia night at Petty Thieves Brewing Co. This inclusive brewery offers a relaxed atmosphere to socialize, compete, and enjoy a night out without any entry fees.

activities.title: Earth Day Free Transit with CATS
activities.description: Celebrate Earth Day by taking advantage of complimentary public transit on all CATS modes. Explore different Charlotte neighborhoods, visit attractions, or simply enjoy a free ride around the city while being environmentally conscious.

activities.title: Earth Day Stream Cleanup & Storm Drain Marking
activities.description: Give back to the community and celebrate Earth Day by volunteering with Storm Water Services for a stream cleanup and storm drain marking event. It's a great way to enjoy the outdoors, meet like-minded individuals, and contribute to local environmental efforts.

activities.title: Explore Art at McColl Center
activities.description: Immerse yourself in contemporary art at the McColl Center for Art + Innovation. This dynamic space in Uptown Charlotte is always free to enter and showcases art being actively created by resident artists, offering a unique cultural experience.
activities.location: McColl Center for Art + Innovation, Uptown

activities.title: Discover the Free Little Art Gallery
activities.description: Experience Charlotte's unique Free Little Art Gallery at StudioWorks. Take a piece of art, leave a piece, or both! It's an accessible and unexpected art encounter where everyone and all art is welcome, fostering community creativity.

activities.title: Karaoke Night at Chasers
activities.description: Head to Chasers, one of Charlotte's longest-running gay bars, for a high-energy karaoke night. Enjoy a vibrant, explicitly queer-friendly atmosphere with dancing and daily drink specials, perfect for a fun and social evening.

activities.title: Guardians of the Graveyard Local History Series
activities.description: Attend a free storytelling experience as part of the 'Guardians of the Graveyard' local history series. Dive into the rich heritage of the North Carolina coast through engaging narratives, offering a unique cultural and educational evening.
activities.location: Charlotte (check local listings for specific venue)

activities.title: Game Night at Urban District Market
activities.description: Join a free game night at the lively Urban District Market. This social event offers a chance to play various board games, meet new people, and enjoy the vibrant atmosphere of a popular Charlotte food hall.

activities.title: Morning Coffee at Giddy Goat
activities.description: Start your day with house-roasted coffee and handmade empanadas at this popular local spot. It's a great place to grab a quick bite and a quality brew before exploring the city. The Plaza Midwood location offers a vibrant atmosphere for people-watching.
activities.location: The Giddy Goat Coffee Roasters, Plaza Midwood

activities.title: Free Art Exploration at McColl Center
activities.description: Immerse yourself in contemporary art at the McColl Center, housed in a beautifully repurposed historic church. Admission is always free, allowing you to explore artist studios and diverse gallery spaces. It's a dynamic hub for creativity in Uptown.
activities.location: McColl Center for Art + Innovation, Uptown

activities.title: Taco Tuesday at Que Onda
activities.description: Enjoy fantastic deals on tacos and Mexican drafts for Taco Tuesday. Que Onda offers a lively atmosphere perfect for a casual afternoon or early evening bite with friends. Their $4 Mexican drafts and $5 small margaritas are a steal.

activities.title: Trivia Night at Wooden Robot Brewery
activities.description: Test your general knowledge at Wooden Robot Brewery's weekly trivia night in South End. Gather your team for a fun, competitive evening with prizes for winning teams. Enjoy their craft beers in a popular brewery setting.

activities.title: Dive Bar Vibes at Hattie's Tap & Tavern
activities.description: Experience a true neighborhood dive bar with a welcoming, queer-friendly atmosphere. Hattie's Tap & Tavern offers local brews on draft and a relaxed setting. It's a great spot for a low-key night out with good company.

activities.title: Running Raptors Run Club
activities.description: Join the Running Raptors for their weekly run club. Choose from 1, 2, or 3-mile routes, and afterwards, enjoy a free beer at Monday Night Garden Co. It's a fantastic way to stay active and socialize with fellow runners.
activities.location: Monday Night Garden Co., South End

activities.title: Craft Beer Happy Hour at Birdsong Brewing Co.
activities.description: Enjoy $5 pints all day, every day, at Birdsong Brewing Co. in NoDa. This popular brewery offers a relaxed atmosphere and a great selection of craft beers, perfect for an early evening unwind.

activities.title: South End Coffee Run
activities.description: Kick off your morning with the South End Coffee Run. This group meets at Not Just Coffee and offers 2, 3, and 4-mile options along the Rail Trail. All participants receive 15% off their coffee order afterward.
activities.location: Not Just Coffee - Atherton Mill, South End

activities.title: Morning Brew at Central Coffee Co.
activities.description: Grab a delicious coffee and a pastry at Central Coffee Co., a beloved Plaza Midwood staple. Known for its cozy interior and quality coffee, it's an ideal spot for a relaxed start to your Wednesday.

activities.title: Wednesday Night Live at Levine Center for the Arts
activities.description: Experience Charlotte's vibrant arts scene with free admission to the Mint Museum Uptown, Bechtler Museum of Modern Art, and the Gantt Center. These museums offer diverse collections and often feature special performances or activities on Wednesday evenings.
activities.location: Levine Center for the Arts, Uptown

activities.title: Cheap Eats Lunch at Maria's Mexican Restaurant
activities.description: Enjoy authentic and affordable Mexican lunch specials at Maria's Mexican Restaurant. Praised for its generous portions and delicious food, you can easily get a satisfying meal for under $12.

activities.title: Trivia Night at Lenny Boy Brewing Co.
activities.description: Join Mindless Minutia Trivia at Lenny Boy Brewing Co. for three rounds of engaging trivia starting at 7 PM. Compete for prizes and enjoy their wide selection of kombucha, beer, and wild ales.
activities.location: Lenny Boy Brewing Co., South End

activities.title: Happy Hour at The Pizza Peel
activities.description: Head to The Pizza Peel in Plaza Midwood for their Wednesday happy hour featuring $3 well liquors. It's a great spot to unwind with affordable drinks and enjoy a casual, neighborhood atmosphere.

activities.title: Karaoke at Jeff's Bucket Shop
activities.description: Sing your heart out at Jeff's Bucket Shop, Charlotte's legendary subterranean karaoke dive bar. Known for its lively atmosphere and daily karaoke, it's a perfect spot for an adventurous night out with friends.

activities.title: Morning Hike at McDowell Nature Preserve
activities.description: Start your day with an invigorating hike through the scenic trails of McDowell Nature Preserve. This expansive preserve offers over 10 miles of forested habitats, perfect for a refreshing outdoor experience. It's a great way to connect with nature just a short drive from the city.

activities.title: Lunch & Explore at Optimist Hall
activities.description: Indulge in a diverse culinary experience at Optimist Hall, a vibrant food hall housed in a historic mill. Choose from a wide array of local eateries offering everything from tacos to ramen, then explore the unique shops and lively atmosphere. It's a perfect spot for a casual and delicious midday meal.

activities.title: Art & Coffee at Camp North End
activities.description: Immerse yourself in creativity at Camp North End, a revitalized industrial complex. Stroll through the open-air art installations, admire vibrant murals, browse unique local boutiques, and grab a craft coffee from Hex Coffee. It's a hub for local artists and entrepreneurs, offering a dynamic and inspiring atmosphere.

activities.title: Craft Cocktails at The Crunkleton
activities.description: Unwind with expertly crafted cocktails at The Crunkleton, a sophisticated bar known for its extensive spirits selection and classic ambiance. Enjoy a meticulously prepared drink in a stylish setting, perfect for a relaxed happy hour or an early evening indulgence. The knowledgeable bartenders can guide you through their impressive menu.

activities.title: Dinner at Haberdish
activities.description: Savor modern Southern comfort food at Haberdish, a beloved NoDa restaurant. Known for its fried chicken, unique sides, and craft cocktails, it offers a cozy yet lively dining experience. It's a fantastic spot to enjoy a delicious meal with a true Charlotte flavor.

activities.title: Trivia Night at Vaulted Oak Brewing
activities.description: Test your knowledge and enjoy local brews at Trivia Night at Vaulted Oak Brewing. This dog-friendly brewery often hosts food trucks, making it a great casual evening out. Gather your friends for a fun and competitive night in a relaxed atmosphere.

activities.title: Morning at Discovery Place Science
activities.description: Engage your curiosity at Discovery Place Science, an interactive museum offering hands-on exhibits across various scientific disciplines. Explore diverse aquariums, state-of-the-art labs, and an indoor rainforest. It's a stimulating and educational experience for all ages, perfect for a morning of discovery.

activities.title: Lunch from a Food Truck at HopFly Brewing Co.
activities.description: Grab a delicious and casual lunch from a rotating food truck at HopFly Brewing Co. in South End. Enjoy a variety of craft beers, seltzers, and cocktails on their spacious patio or rooftop, making it a great spot for a relaxed midday meal. It's a vibrant and pet-friendly brewery near Uptown.

activities.title: Climbing at US National Whitewater Center
activities.description: Seek adventure with a climbing session at the US National Whitewater Center. With a variety of climbing walls and bouldering options, it offers a thrilling outdoor challenge. It's an excellent way to get active and enjoy the unique facilities. Note that there is a $12 parking fee per vehicle.
activities.location: US National Whitewater Center, West Charlotte

activities.title: Stroll the Little Sugar Creek Greenway
activities.description: Enjoy a leisurely afternoon stroll or bike ride along the Little Sugar Creek Greenway. This extensive urban greenway connects various parks and neighborhoods, offering a refreshing escape with scenic views and public art. It's a free and accessible way to explore Charlotte's natural beauty.

activities.title: Dinner at Alexander Michael's
activities.description: Experience classic Charlotte charm and delicious pub-style comfort food at Alexander Michael's in the historic Fourth Ward. This beloved neighborhood stalwart has been serving up hearty dishes and a welcoming atmosphere for decades. It's a great spot for a satisfying and nostalgic dinner.

activities.title: Drag Show at Bar Argon
activities.description: Experience a lively drag performance at Bar Argon, one of Charlotte's most popular LGBTQ+ bars. Known for its energetic weekly drag shows and vibrant dance floor, it's a fantastic spot for an entertaining night out. Expect talented local queens and a welcoming, inclusive atmosphere.

activities.title: Live Music at The Evening Muse
activities.description: Discover up-and-coming talent or enjoy an intimate performance at The Evening Muse, a cozy live music venue in NoDa. This award-winning spot is known for its diverse lineup of singer-songwriters, folk artists, and indie acts. It's the perfect place to unwind with great music and a relaxed vibe.

activities.title: Luxury Spa Morning at The Ballantyne
activities.description: Indulge in a personalized luxury spa experience at The Spa at The Ballantyne, known for its comprehensive services including therapeutic massages, rejuvenating facials, and signature body treatments. Consider a couples massage in a private spa suite for an intimate start to the day.

activities.title: Private Mural Art Tour
activities.description: Embark on a private 'In The Streets & Eats' Mural Art Tour to explore Charlotte's vibrant street art scene. A local guide will provide insights into the artists and hidden meanings behind the city's most striking murals, offering unique photo opportunities.
activities.location: Various locations, starting near ImaginOn, Uptown

activities.title: Exclusive Tasting Menu at Counter-
activities.description: Experience an adventurous 10- or 14-course tasting menu at Counter-, a James Beard-recognized restaurant. The dishes are not released in advance, creating a sensory experience paired with a unique theme, music, and art.

activities.title: Upscale Cocktails at Idlewild
activities.description: Discover a personalized cocktail experience at Idlewild, a cozy bar in NoDa with a unique 'no-menu' approach. Bartenders craft drinks based on your preferences, ensuring a bespoke and intimate evening.

activities.title: VIP Nightlife at The Scorpio
activities.description: Immerse yourself in Charlotte's longest-running LGBTQ+ nightclub complex, The Scorpio. Known for its vibrant atmosphere, diverse crowd, and spectacular nightly drag shows, it promises an energetic and unforgettable night out.

activities.title: Private In-Home Cooking Class
activities.description: Elevate your culinary skills with a private, one-on-one cooking class from Copper & Thyme. A personal chef will guide you through new techniques and cuisines in the comfort of your own home, with a custom menu tailored to your desires.

activities.title: Luxury Shopping & Personal Styling
activities.description: Indulge in a high-end shopping spree at SouthPark Mall, home to luxury retailers like Nordstrom and Neiman Marcus. Enhance the experience with a private personal styling session to curate a bespoke wardrobe.

activities.title: Fine Dining at Steak 48
activities.description: Savor a premier steakhouse experience at Steak 48, acclaimed for its USDA Prime Steaks, Japanese A5 Wagyu, and fresh seafood flown in daily. Enjoy a luxurious atmosphere with an extensive wine list and impeccable service.

activities.title: Rooftop Cocktails at Búho Bar
activities.description: Enjoy handcrafted cocktails and South American-inspired tapas at Búho Bar, a chic rooftop lounge atop the Grand Bohemian Hotel. Take in panoramic city views and a sophisticated ambiance with live DJ sets.

activities.title: Concert at Neighborhood Theatre
activities.description: Catch a live performance by 'FALCO & BOOK PLAY JERRY GARCIA' at the intimate Neighborhood Theatre. This historic venue offers a unique setting to enjoy music.

activities.title: VIP Experience at Trio Nightclub
activities.description: Elevate your night out with VIP table service at Trio Nightclub, Charlotte's premier EDM venue. Experience state-of-the-art light and video production, cutting-edge sound, and line-cutting privileges for expedited entry.

activities.title: Charlotte Ghost Hunt Challenge
activities.description: Step into the shoes of a detective and unravel a mysterious murder case at your own pace. Use your wits and phone to gather evidence, interrogate suspects, and solve puzzles hidden across Uptown Charlotte in this immersive outdoor adventure. It's a unique blend of true crime and city exploration.

activities.title: Paranormal Investigation at Hugh Torance House
activities.description: Join experienced experts from the Charlotte Area Paranormal Society (CAPS) for an authentic ghost hunt at North Carolina's oldest store, dating back to 1779. Scour the rooms and grounds for existential activity using professional investigative tools. This event offers a genuinely spooky and historical experience.

activities.title: Fringe Theater: Stereophonic
activities.description: Experience 'Stereophonic,' the Tony Award-winning play by David Adjmi with music by Will Butler of Arcade Fire, at the Knight Theater. This raw, immersive production offers a surprising and deep look into the creative process of a 1970s rock band. It's recommended for ages 13+.

activities.title: The Dinner Detective Murder Mystery Show
activities.description: Solve a hilarious crime over a fantastic dinner at North America's largest interactive comedy true crime murder mystery dinner show. The culprit is hidden among the audience, and you might even become a prime suspect. Expect mild content, loud noises, and adult humor.

activities.title: Charlotte Haunted Booze and Boos Tour
activities.description: Explore Uptown Charlotte's unsettling past on this ghost walk combined with a pub crawl. Hear spooky stories, learn about lingering spirits, and dare to explore the Queen City's haunted pubs and historic sites. This 21+ tour offers a thrilling and educational experience.
activities.location: Uptown Charlotte (starts at a haunted bar)

activities.title: The Battery Show South & MD&M South Expo
activities.description: Dive into the unexpected world of advanced manufacturing, EV technology, and battery innovation at this massive industry expo. Witness cutting-edge solutions and connect with engineers and innovators shaping the future of electrification. Your expo pass grants access to both events, offering a truly unique and expansive experience.

activities.title: Earth Day: Free Public Transit Adventure
activities.description: Celebrate Earth Day by taking advantage of complimentary public transit across all CATS modes. This unexpected city-wide offering provides a unique opportunity to explore Charlotte's diverse neighborhoods and hidden gems without cost. Discover new parts of the city in an eco-friendly way.

activities.title: Charlotte Spooktacular All-Ages Ghost Walk
activities.description: Embark on a non-frightening yet captivating ghost walk suitable for the entire family. This tour covers more of the haunted Queen City, with non-stop stories and spooky landmarks. It's a perfect way to learn about Charlotte's ghostly tales without the intense scares.

activities.title: Fringe Theater: Stereophonic
activities.description: Experience 'Stereophonic,' the Tony Award-winning play by David Adjmi with music by Will Butler of Arcade Fire, at the Knight Theater. This raw, immersive production offers a surprising and deep look into the creative process of a 1970s rock band. It's recommended for ages 13+.

activities.title: The Dinner Detective Murder Mystery Show
activities.description: Solve a hilarious crime over a fantastic dinner at North America's largest interactive comedy true crime murder mystery dinner show. The culprit is hidden among the audience, and you might even become a prime suspect. Expect mild content, loud noises, and adult humor.
